title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Morgans, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Nami, Unknown person #7 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least, that's the sort of article you'll do me the favor of writing, right,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine, but at least let me get the scoop on the contents of that thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure, if all you're going to take are pictures. What a shrewd man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess it's to be expected of an information manipulator like your- self.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a newsman! I'll sue you over that difference!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You told me back on Fishman Island,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'll be the one that wins in the end," right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And you still wanna run?! Spine- less!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't take the bait, Luffy! She's trying to get a rise out of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of what I said was mistaken, big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one that'll be pirate King in the end...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaidou?! Maaaaamama... you lot will never take down that 74ZNG.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who said you little shits could even dream

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: of getting out of my territory?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
